overview: ModelAudit is a professional SaaS platform for AI ethics, bias detection, and safety auditing. Submit AI model outputs for structured analysis — get risk scores, bias flags across 7 dimensions, safety assessments, regulatory compliance mapping, and prioritized remediation guidance.
features: AI-powered bias detection across 7 dimensions (gender, race, age, disability, etc.)
Safety analysis for harmful content, misinformation, PII exposure, and manipulation
Animated risk score meter with Claude-generated verdict and audit trail
Regulatory compliance mapping against EU AI Act, NYC Local Law 144, and more
3-step audit wizard with text paste and CSV file upload support
Dashboard with stat cards, recent audits table, and activity feed
Newspaper-column layout with authoritative investigative journalism aesthetic
